/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/MicroXRCEAgent.dir/microxrce_agent.cpp.o -o MicroXRCEAgent  -Wl,-rpath,/workspaces/isaac_ros-dev/build/microxrcedds_agent:/usr/local/lib: libmicroxrcedds_agent.so.3.0.0 -lrt -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libspdlog.so.1.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libfmt.so.8.1.1 -Wl,--as-needed /usr/local/lib/libfastcdr.so.2.2.7 -Wl,-rpath-link,/usr/local/lib
